My 4-pronged deformation of man puts the final indubible stamp of Gnosticism on the entire corpus of not just my writing but my thought, as expressed in this exegesis. It is one of the 3 bases of Gnosticism: 1) ignorance; 2) salvific secret revealed knowledge as the ontological reversal of ignorance; 3) acosmism. + of course 4) this world disclosed as a prison - which we are deliberately occluded to by the creator.
